title: x^(2^n) mod CRC-32 polynomial (for CRC combine)
signature: pub fn x2nmodp(n: u64, k: u32) -> u32
notes: Computes x^(2^n) mod the CRC-32 polynomial. Used by crc32_combine to advance the CRC state by 2^n zero bits. Implements repeated squaring: start with p = x^(2^k), then square n times via the multmodp helper.
